title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Tupperware India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Tupperware India
jsonLd.description:
We at Tupperware India are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Tupperware India:
Tupperware India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tupperware India!
